text: Answer FOUR of the ten essay questions.
There is a limit of 1125 words per essay.

Where appropriate (e.g. for formulae, equations, or diagrams) you may hand write and submit scans or photographs of your answers. Candidates should not copy and paste figures from any other documents.

sub-instructions: ⓘ Answer FOUR of the ten essays.
content: How does the nervous system make use of ion channels of differing ionic selectivity?
Discuss the visual consequences of moving from a well-lit environment into near darkness.
Discuss the role of context in the modulation of neural responses from receptor to cortex in the somatosensory system.
To what extent can the motor system be considered hierarchical?
Discuss the relationship between synaptic plasticity and behavioural learning.
Discuss the principal mechanisms of axon pathfinding that underlie the formation of complex structures, such as the spinal cord.
Compare and contrast the molecular mechanisms of anterior-posterior patterning with dorsal-ventral patterning in the vertebrate nervous system.
What can animal studies contribute to understanding the brain mechanisms of emotion? Discuss with reference to the emotion of fear.
Discuss, with evidence, the role of the hippocampus in spatial memory.
What do we know about visual processing with respect to the 2-streams hypothesis?
